data: {"generalSituation":"An anticyclone aloft will affect the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. It will be rather warm during the day over the region and hot over inland areas. However, a band of clouds will cover Guangdong on Thursday. An easterly airstream will affect the coast of southern China over the weekend. It will be slightly cloudier over the region. A trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to southern China early to midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260324","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":27,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":22,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":95,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":70,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":51,"PSR":"Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260325","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy periods in the morning and at night.
